channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US deepens European uncertainty with deployment of 5,000 troops to Poland
item.description: Erratic US policy moves leave European NATO partners increasingly unclear about which areas they should prioritise.

item.title: Lebanon’s economy struggles under renewed war and global fuel crisis
item.description: Lebanon's ongoing war and financial crises threaten to render the nation economically unviable, experts warn.

item.title: US raises threat of military action against Cuba
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Cuba poses a national security threat.

item.title: Japan’s World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group, squad
item.description: Japan have beaten Germany, Brazil, England and Spain since 2022, but may struggle to sustain a genuine title push.

item.title: Iran war day 84: US-Iran talks advance amid mediation push
item.description: US and Iran continue mediated talks, exchanging draft proposals aimed at reaching a formal agreement.

item.title: Monfils warms up for final French Open with star-studded farewell party
item.description: The evening blended tennis, ​music and tributes to celebrate his two-decade journey on the professional tour.

item.title: Two-time NASCAR champ Kyle Busch dies at 41 after ‘severe illness’
item.description: Busch was in his 22nd full-time season in NASCAR's top division, where he won two Cup Series titles in 2015 and 2019.

item.title: Knicks move two wins from the NBA Finals with 109-93 victory over the Cavs
item.description: New York Knicks use an explosive third quarter to take a 2-0 lead over Cleveland in the NBA Eastern Conference finals.

item.title: Thousands attend funeral prayers for San Diego mosque attack victims
item.description: More than 2,000 people gathered for Islamic funeral prayers in San Diego for three men killed in mosque attack

item.title: Turkish opposition leader vows to stay after court ousts him
item.description: Turkiye’s main opposition leader Ozgur Ozel has vowed not to leave party headquarters.

item.title: US pausing $14bn arms sale to Taiwan due to Iran war, navy chief says
item.description: Acting Navy Secretary Hung Cao's remarks come as US President Donald Trump gives mixed signals on the sale.

item.title: Malaysia orders TikTok to address ‘defamatory’ content about king
item.description: Watchdog instructs social media giant to strengthen moderation following circulation of 'grossly offensive' content.

item.title: Caitriona Graham recounts violent treatment after Gaza flotilla raid
item.description: Irish activist Caitriona Graham recounts violent treatment after Gaza flotilla raid

item.title: Greenlanders protest opening of new US consulate in Nuuk
item.description: Hundreds of demonstrators gathered in Nuuk as the United States opened a new consulate in Greenland’s capital.

item.title: Turkish court ousts leader of main opposition party
item.description: Ankara court overturns results of leadership election won by Republican People's Party head Ozgur Ozel.

item.title: US Senate pushes back against Trump’s $1.8bn ‘anti-weaponisation’ fund
item.description: The Senate delayed a vote on immigration enforcement funds in a rare show of dissent ahead of its Memorial Day recess.

item.title: Iran war live: Signs of progress amid efforts to reach US-Iran peace deal
item.description: A new opinion poll in the US suggests that 60 percent of Americans now oppose President Donald Trump's war on Iran.

item.title: US says it has not changed its stance on sanctioning Francesca Albanese
item.description: The Trump administration had sanctioned the UN expert for her criticism of Israel's policies towards Palestinians.

item.title: Over 2,000 gather in San Diego to mourn three men killed in mosque attack
item.description: The three men killed in the shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego were remembered as heroes at the memorial.

item.title: At least 16 people killed in two attacks in northern Honduras
item.description: One attack involved a police raid, while the other took place on a palm farm, killing rural labourers.

item.title: Board of Peace envoy warns ‘permanent’ Gaza divide under current status quo
item.description: UN Security Council urged to press for Israeli obligations and Hamas disarmament under Gaza 'ceasefire' roadmap.

item.title: Ronaldo scores twice to seal Saudi Pro League at last with Al-Nassr
item.description: Portugal forward Cristiano Ronaldo leads Al-Nassr to Saudi Pro League title in last game before World Cup 2026.

item.title: Ebola treatment hospital burned down in DRC as outbreak spreads
item.description: Protesters set a hospital on fire in the Democratic of Congo, as authorities struggle to contain an Ebola outbreak.

item.title: NYC launches lottery for $50 World Cup football tickets
item.description: New York City is launching a lottery for 1,000 discounted World Cup tickets priced at $50.

item.title: Flotilla activists recount Israeli violence as they arrive in Turkiye
item.description: Activists from the Global Sumud Flotilla arrived in Istanbul on Thursday and described Israeli violence.
